note: ONI (3-month running mean) is the stress index input. latest_weekly shows current-week Nino3.4 for dashboard context — it typically reads 1-2C higher than ONI during rapid El Nino onset.

latest_weekly.label: Weak El Niño
latest_weekly.note: Weekly Nino3.4 OISST anomaly (1-week lag). Higher resolution than ONI 3-month mean.
